themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "O thou sword of the LORD, how long will it be ere thou be quiet? put up thyself into thy scab...".
